name: I have asthma already—can I still claim new chemical exposure worsened it?

mainEntity.name: I have asthma already—can I still claim new chemical exposure worsened it?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, for aggravation with doctor proof.[9]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, if work exposure aggravates pre-existing condition, comp covers increase.** Aggravation rule applies.[9] Medical proof of worsening essential. Get comparative reports. Viable claims common.

description: Yes, for aggravation with doctor proof.[9]
